home.title: Pazzo Frontend
home.subtitle: Nuxt 4 + Tailwind 4 + Clean Architecture + DDD baseline
home.description: Starter project with localization, Pinia, and testing ready to scale.

landing.title: Turn every route into a stamped story
landing.subtitle: Pazzo turns your rides into visible progress: collect checkpoint stamps, unlock milestones, and share your growth through a gamified cycling experience.

features.passportBody: Browse curated experiences by adventure type, difficulty, and city. Every passport has clear goals and real rewards.
features.qrBody: Scan, validate, and stamp in seconds with a guided flow optimized for speed outdoors and fraud prevention.
features.mapBody: Locate stations, review zone progress, and plan your next stop with real-time visual context.

steps.one: Pick a passport and set your adventure goal.
steps.two: Scan checkpoints to register verified stamps.
steps.three: Complete challenges, unlock badges, and level up.
